steps.title: Identify what the entries are
steps.content: The passage explicitly labels these Wikipedia entries as “fictitious.” The blank asks what they were “finally recognized as.”

steps.title: Match the meaning to the context
steps.content: Fabrications directly means false inventions or made-up things—the perfect match for how fictitious entries would be recognized. The other three mean improvements, examination, or disclosed truths, all incompatible with their false nature. That matches choice C — C is correct.
